case_title: JOHN BAKER VS. TYRONE STRICKLAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY BAKER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT STRICKLAND, TYRONE STRICKLAND, THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRICKLAND, TYRONE STRICKLAND, THERESA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,115.00, SEE ATTACHMENT 1 (FORM MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED MAY-15-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRICKLAND, THERESA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY BAKER, JOHN STRICKLAND, TYRONE STRICKLAND, THERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF JOHN BAKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TYRONE STRICKLAND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THERESA STRICKLAND IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STRICKLAND, TYRONE STRICKLAND, THERESA
